title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? LG Soft India Holdings Services in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
